Fees and charges

Personal

Accounts Summary Details

Our Latest Account Summary Details

We are updating our account balance requirements and interest rates so you can get more out of banking with us. Effective 01 January 2024, the table below will apply.

  Opening Balance Maintaining Balance Interest Rate
(% p.a)		 Debit Card Passbook Checkbook
All Access No opening balance
(PHP5,000 before January 1, 2024)		 PHP25,000  0.05%*

(PHP5,000 before January 1, 2024)		 PHP3,000
(Effective May 1, 2026)		  0.05%*
✓**

x
GoalSetter PHP500 PHP5,000 0.5000% to 3.0000%****

*earn this rate for an Average Daily Balance of PHP25,000 and above
** get for FREE when you open an All Access or Easy Savings Account
***get for FREE when you open an All Access Account and maintain PHP25,000
****depends on maintaining balance. See the GoalSetter Interest Rate table.

ATM and Debit Card Transactions
PROCESS/TRANSACTION FEES/CHARGES
Interbank ATM Withdrawal Fee PHP10 (PHP15; effectivity date April 07, 2021); PHP300 for Cirrus/Maestro
Interbank ATM Balance Inquiry Fee PHP1 (PHP2; effectivity date April 07, 2021)
Declined Transaction for Cirrus Maestro PHP60
Interbank Funds Transfer (IBFT):
  • One (1) to four (4) transactions per day: PHP25 per transaction
  • Five (5) or more IBFT per day: PHP80 per transaction
Foreign Currency Transactions 1.65% of the transaction amount

Note: Acquirer-based fee model will be implemented beginning April 7, 2021.

Effective January 11, 2026, ALL deposit products will be charged a transfer fee of PHP10.00 for each InstaPay transaction via the Security Bank Online app real time. Charges for Easy Account remain applicable.

No charges will be applied for Gold Circle and Wealth Management Clients.

Checking and Savings Accounts
FEES AND CHARGES PESO SAVINGS ACCOUNT PESO CHECKING ACCOUNT  DOLLAR SAVINGS ACCOUNT
Notarial Fee (notarization of affidavit of loss) for Lost Passbook PHP200
Replacement of Lost Passbook or Trackbook/Recordbook (for Peso Checking Account) PHP200                       PHP200
Bank Certification

PHP200 (including Bank Certification for the British Embassy)

InstaPay (No InstaPay charges to be applied for Gold Circle and Wealth clients)

Starting January 11, 2026

 PHP10 PHP10
PESONet (No PESONet charges to be applied for Gold Circle and Wealth clients) PHP50 PHP50
Statement of Account (SOA)

PHP100 per page (for Easy Account)

PHP50 per page (for all other savings accounts)

 PHP50 per page PHP50 per page (SOA for previous year/s)
Electronic Statement of Account (eSOA) — Free-of-charge —

Dormancy Charges starting on the 61st month

Reminders:

1.      You may visit your Depository Branch to reactivate your account and avoid dormancy charges.
2.       Please bring the following:

a.       For corporate accounts:

  • Two (2) valid IDs (2 primary IDs, or 1 primary ID and 1 secondary ID)
  • Passbook (as applicable)
  • Secretary Certificate and/or Board Resolution

b.       For Individual accounts:

  • Two (2) valid IDs (2 primary IDs, or 1 primary ID and 1 secondary ID)
  • Passbook (as applicable)
 PHP30 per month PHP30 per month PHP30 per month (based on the prevailing exchange rate)

Minimum Balance Charges are to be collected only if the account falls below the minimum balance for two (2) consecutive months

Note:

1.  Applicable to Active and Dormant accounts
2. If your account remains dormant for ten (10) consecutive years, the remaining balance will be escheated in favor of the Treasury of the Philippines under the Unclaimed Balance Law (Republic Act No. 3936, as amended by Presidential Decree No. 679)

 PHP300 per month
  • For All-Access Account: Php500 per month
  • For BusinessPlus Account: Php1,000 per month after two (2) consecutive months of falling below the required minimum maintaining balance.
  • For other checking accounts: Php300 per month
 USD10 per month
Early Closure Charges (within 30 days)

PHP300 within 30 days (PHP500 starting September 15, 2021)

USD5 within 30 days (USD 15 starting September 15, 2021)
Over-the-Counter (OTC) Deposit Fee, for eSecure Savings Account only PHP100 — —
Over-the-counter (OTC) Withdrawal Fee (up to PHP50,000.00) Effective April 1, 2025:
PHP 100: All products with ATM card
Free: Pensioner account
Waived for Gold Circle members, Wealth clients, persons with disabilities (PWD), and senior citizens
Over-the-counter (OTC) Fund Transfer (up to PHP500,000.00) Effective April 1, 2025:
PHP 100: All products with ATM card
Waived for Gold Circle members, Wealth clients, persons with disabilities (PWD), and senior citizens
Stop Payment Order (SPO) Request — PHP300 per check; For more than 5 checks, a maximum amount of PHP1,500 per SPO request —
Cost of Checkbook —
  • For All-Access, BusinessPlus, Regular Checking and All-In-One Checking Accounts: PHP250 (Personal)(PHP300 starting September 15, 2021)
    ; PHP500 (Commercial); PHP750 (with voucher)
  • For CheckPower: PHP250 (Personal) (PHP300 starting September 15, 2021) ;
    PHP500 (Commercial)
  • For CheckRight: PHP750 (with voucher); PHP500 (without voucher)
  • For CheckOne: PHP250 (Personal) (PHP300 starting September 15, 2021); PHP500 (Commercial)

Cost of Debit MasterCard Replacement

PHP300 (for Easy Account)

 

PHP300 (for all other savings accounts)

 PHP300 —
Cost of PIN Mailer Replacement PHP100 PHP100 —
Any Debit Card PIN-related request via branch (i.e. PIN reset or PIN replacement) PHP100 (for Easy Account) — —
RCOCI Charges — PHP1,000 per check + PHP200 per day for every PHP40,000 amount of check or a fraction thereof —
Presenting Bank’s Charges on Returned Checks — PHP1,000 per check USD38.00 per check
Lifting of the 3 days hold on dollar notes deposit (For Cash Withdrawal) — — None

Why this applies:

Larger U.S. dollar cash deposits require additional handling and processing.

A minimal service charge is applied only to the amount exceeding USD 5,000.

US Dollar Notes, deposits exceeding USD5,000 made by Individual or Business clients during the day

(except for Money Services Business [MSB]/Foreign Exchange Dealers and individual accounts of MSB/Foreign Exchange Dealer proprietor/owner)

 
— —

0.10% of the amount over USD5,000 regardless of region

Note: ALL AMOUNT of foreign currency cash deposits from individuals, sole proprietorships, and corporations of MSBs shall be charged a 0.10% service charge without application of the threshold amount. To illustrate:

3rd Currency Check Deposit — —
  • Correspondent Bank Charges: To be determined based on currency
  • Courier Charges: To be determined based on currency
  • Collection Fee: USD6 per check, to be collected upon clearance of the check
Foreign currency checks received over-the-counter — —
  • Collection Items:
CHARGE AMOUNT OF CHECK
USD2.50 per check USD25.00 to USD50.00
USD5.00 per check Over USD50.00

Note: Not applicable for SB MasterCard Dollar billings.

  • Plus Fx Bills Purchased interest for FXBP
  • Plus DST of 0.60 for every PHP200.00, for dollar checks for deposit to peso account. A note representing the payment of the DST should be stamped on the FX Manifold.

Inward Remittances
SOURCE OF REMITTANCE DESCRIPTION OF CHARGES RATES/FEES
1. Foreign Telegraphic Transfer

Credit to USD CASA

 Commission USD5.50

Credit to Other FX Ccy (JPY, EUR, AUD, GBP, HKD, SGD, CAD)

 Commission Equivalent of USD5.50 Computed as follows: e.g. Yen Credit USD5.50 X Selling Rate (SR) (Dollar to Peso) / Buying Rate (Yen to Peso)

Credit to PHP CASA

 Commission USD5.50@ Selling Rate
DST PHP0.60 per PHP200 and a fraction thereof

Credit USD CASA with other local banks thru PDDTS (USD)

 Commission USD5.50

Credit PHP CASA with other local banks thru EPCS (PHP)

 Commission USD5.50 @ Selling Rate
DST PHP0.60 per PHP200 and a fraction thereof
2. Local Telegraphic Transfer (PDDTS)

Credit to USD CASA

 Commission USD5.50

Credit to PHP CASA

 Commission USD5.50@ Selling Rate
DST PHP0.60 per PHP200 and a fraction thereof

Return to Sender USD

 Commission USD7.50
3. Local Telegraphic Transfer (RTGS)

Credit to PHP CASA

 Commission PHP100
RTGS Charges Computed as: Principal amount X .00001
For Principal Amount of up to PHP10,000,500 Minimum of PHP100
For Principal Amount above PHP10,000,500 Principal Amount X .00001 rounded off to the nearest Peso
For Principal Amount of PHP40MM and above Maximum of PHP400
4. Local Telegraphic Transfer (PesoNet)

Credit to PHP CASA

 Service Charge PHP0
Outward Remittances
DESCRIPTION OF CHARGES RATES/FEES
1. Foreign Telegraphic Transfer

Commission

 USD20 or its peso equivalent at Selling Rate (“SR”)

DST (if principal is funded in pesos)

 PHP0.60 per PHP200 and a fraction thereof

If correspondent bank charges is “OUR”*

a. For USD and other 3rd Ccy**

 USD15 or its peso equivalent at SR

b. For YEN Ccy**

 YEN5,000 or its USD/peso equivalent at SR

c. For EUR Ccy**

 EUR40 or its USD/peso equivalent at SR

d. For HKD Ccy**

 HKD300 or its USD/peso equivalent at SR

e. For AUD Ccy**

 AUD25 or its USD/Peso equivalent at SR

f. For SGD Ccy**

 SGD20 or its USD/peso equivalent at SR

g. For NZD Ccy**

 NZD60 or its USD/peso equivalent at SR

h. For GBP Ccy**

 GBP20 or its USD/peso equivalent at SR

i. For CNY Ccy**

 CNY55 or its USD/peso equivalent at SR

j. For CAD Ccy**

 CAD15 or its USD/peso equivalent at SR

k. For CHF Ccy**

 CHF20 or its USD/Peso equivalent at SR

l. For THB Ccy (OTC only)**

 THB675 or its USD/Peso equivalent at SR
2. Local Telegraphic Transfer (PDDTS)

Commission

 USD15 or its peso equivalent at SR

DST (if principal is funded in Pesos)

 PHP0.60 per PHP200 and a fraction thereof
3. Local Telegraphic Transfer (RTGS)

Commission

 PHP400

RTGS Charges Computed as: Principal amount X .00001
  • Minimum of PHP100 for Principal Amount of up to PHP10,000,000
  • For Principal Amount above PHP10,000,000, multiply Principal Amount by .00001 rounded off to the nearest Peso
  • Maximum of PHP400 for Principal Amount of PHP40MM and above

If correspondent bank charges is “OUR”*

 To be collected upon receipt of billing from the beneficiary bank
4. Local Telegraphic Transfer (PesoNet)

Service Charge (Over the Counter)

 PHP50

* SBC Client is the Remitter and all charges will be debited from his account.
** Subject to change, and billing received from the Beneficiary Bank.
Updated as of April 2026.

Applicable for transactions initiated via Over the Counter and DigiBanker.

Underlying documents required 

  • Download the files and save them on your device [insert links to MTAF, TTAF, etc…] 
  • Open the files using your device’s PDF reader. 
  • Fill in all the fields.  
  • Print a copy of the file. 
  • Sign the document using a wet signature. 
  • Submit the MTAF or TTAF to your desired branch (Please
    coordinate with your corporation’s RM for pick up/drop off instructions) 

Download the Money Transfer Application Form 

Download the Telegraphic Transfer Application Form
